growth_records.medium: Baltic Sea surface seawater (in situ DIP)

up.method: bulk seawater 13C stable-isotope incubation (community-level, not species-specific), GC-IRMS
bulk seawater 15N2 stable-isotope incubation (community-level, not species-specific), MIMS/IRMS

growth_records.cite: Niels J. Schoffelen et al. Phosphate availability affects fixed nitrogen transfer from diazotrophs to their epibionts. The ISME Journal (2019). DOI:10.1038/s41396-019-0453-5. [PMC6794295]
growth_records.snippet: The C-based growth rate of Aphanizomenon decreased from 0.51 to 0.38 day-1 (p<0.001), while the N-based growth rate increased from 0.22 to 0.29 day-1 (p<0.001) when DIP was added. ... bulk CO2 fixation: 15.5 +/- 1.2 umol C L-1 day-1; bulk N
growth_records.notes: IN SITU (low-DIP) condition. Cyanobacterium = prokaryote. C-based single-cell growth rate = 0.51 day-1 (reported, from single-cell 13C incorporation; value cited to companion paper Schoffelen et al. ref [46]). Converted to per-h: 0.51/24 = 0.0213 h-1. Doubling time td = ln2/mu = 0.693/0.51 = 1.359 day = 32.6 h. N-based single-cell growth rate = 0.22 day-1 (= 0.00917 h-1; td = 0.693/0.22 = 3.15 day = 75.6 h) — the C-based value is used as the primary growth_rate. CO2 and N2 fixation (=C and N uptake) rates listed are BULK community rates for the whole seawater (15.5 umol C L-1 day-1 and 1.23 umol N L-1 day-1), NOT species-specific Aphanizomenon per-gDW rates; per-cell fixation reported only graphically (Fig 5-6), no numeric per-cell mmol/gDW/h given in text. Temp 17.4-18.0 C, light ~280 umol photons m-2 s-1, 18h:6h. No pH reported.

growth_records.medium: Baltic Sea surface seawater + 1 umol/L DIP amendment
growth_records.cite: Niels J. Schoffelen et al. Phosphate availability affects fixed nitrogen transfer from diazotrophs to their epibionts. The ISME Journal (2019). DOI:10.1038/s41396-019-0453-5. [PMC6794295]
growth_records.snippet: The C-based growth rate of Aphanizomenon decreased from 0.51 to 0.38 day-1 (p<0.001), while the N-based growth rate increased from 0.22 to 0.29 day-1 (p<0.001) when DIP was added.
growth_records.notes: DIP-AMENDED (+1 umol/L) condition. C-based single-cell growth rate = 0.38 day-1 (reported). Converted: 0.38/24 = 0.0158 h-1; td = ln2/mu = 0.693/0.38 = 1.824 day = 43.8 h. N-based growth rate rose to 0.29 day-1 (= 0.0121 h-1; td = 0.693/0.29 = 2.39 day = 57.4 h). C-based value used as primary growth_rate. Bulk CO2/N2 fixation rates were measured on the in-situ experiment (not repeated per-condition here), so uptake_rates left empty for the amended condition to avoid misattribution. No species-specific per-gDW uptake rate given. Growth-rate values cited in text to companion paper Schoffelen et al. ref [46].
